name: @ts-fix/rules-security-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of ts-fix's `security` rule category (RULE-025): 5 SYN AST/regex predicates (no-eval-or-function-constructor, no-implied-eval, no-insecure-url, no-new-buffer, no-secrets-in-source). Vendor-anchored regex scanning only (AWS/GitHub/Stripe key shapes, no entropy heuristic). Strangler-fig slice — consumes @ts-fix/rules-core-effect for the rule substrate (defineRule/runRule/Rule/RuleContext) and @ts-fix/contracts-effect for the Diagnostic/RuleMeta contracts. Plain-TS AST/regex predicates wrapping the TS compiler API — NOT Effect-wrapped (visitors are sync).
